CREATE TABLE dates_test (date_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date_string;
SELECT date_string, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string, 3) AS parsed_date FROM dates_test;
CREATE TABLE more_dates_test AS (SELECT date_string FROM dates_test) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY date_string;
SELECT date_string, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string, 3) AS parsed_date FROM more_dates_test WHERE parsed_date = '1970-01-01 00:00:00';
WITH (SELECT arrayJoin(['12/31/2021', '01/01/2022', 'invalid/date', '02/30/2022'])) AS test_dates SELECT test_dates, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(test_dates, 3) AS parsed_test_date;
CREATE TABLE nested_test (id UInt32, date_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, date_string, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(date_string, 3) AS parsed_date FROM nested_test WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM nested_test WHERE date_string LIKE '%2022%') ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE join_test (id UInt32, date_string String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT a.id, a.date_string, parseDateTime64BestEffortUSOrZero(a.date_string, 3) AS parsed_date FROM join_test AS a JOIN (SELECT id FROM join_test WHERE id > 1) AS b ON a.id = b.id;
